summary: Application with PDF report functionality. Currently supports monthly and yearly report selection. Adding custom date range selection (e.g., January 1st to March 31st) while keeping the same table format.

existing_features.title: On the PDF Report page (RapportPDFPage.tsx), add a third period selection mode called 'Custom Range' (alongside the existing 'Month' and 'Year' modes). This mode must allow the user to pick a start date and an end date freely (e.g., January 1st to March 31st). The existing table format used for monthly and yearly reports must be reused unchanged for this custom range output.

Update the data aggregation logic in RapportPDFPage.tsx to support filtering appointments by an arbitrary date range (start timestamp to end timestamp), so that the custom range period feeds into the same report-building pipeline used by month and year modes.

new_feature_requests.summary: Ajouter une option de plage de dates personnalisée dans le rapport PDF (en plus du mois et de l'année), permettant de choisir une date de début et une date de fin, en conservant le même format de tableau.
